segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: What was sweet as honey and why?

translations.zh-Hans: 什么东西像蜂蜜一样甜？为什么？

segments.text: In 1963, a Lancaster bomber crashed on Wallis Island, a remote place in the South Pacific, a long way west of Samoa.

translations.zh-Hans: 1963年，一架兰开斯特轰炸机在瓦利斯岛坠毁。那是南太平洋上一处偏僻的地方，位于萨摩亚以西很远处。

segments.text: The plane wasn't too badly damaged, but Over the years, the crash was forgotten and the wreck remained undisturbed.

translations.zh-Hans: 飞机损坏得并不太严重，但随着岁月流逝，这起事故被人遗忘，飞机残骸一直无人触动。

segments.text: Then, in 1989, 26 years after the crash, the plane was accidentally rediscovered in an aerial survey of the island.

translations.zh-Hans: 后来到了1989年，也就是失事26年后，人们在对该岛进行航空勘测时偶然重新发现了这架飞机。

segments.text: By this time, a Lancaster bomber in reasonable condition was rare and worth rescuing.

translations.zh-Hans: 当时，状况尚可的兰开斯特轰炸机已经十分罕见，值得抢救。

segments.text: The French authorities had the plane packaged and moved in parts back to France.

translations.zh-Hans: 法国当局把飞机包装起来，拆成零件运回法国。

segments.text: Now, a group of enthusiasts are going to have the plane restored.

translations.zh-Hans: 现在，一群爱好者准备请人修复这架飞机。

segments.text: It has four Rolls-Royce Merlin engines, but the group will need to have only three of them rebuilt.

translations.zh-Hans: 它装有四台劳斯莱斯“梅林”发动机，不过其中只有三台需要重修。

segments.text: Imagine their surprise and delight when they broke open the packing cases and found that the fourth engine was sweet as honey, still in perfect condition.

translations.zh-Hans: 当他们拆开包装箱，发现第四台发动机像蜂蜜一样甜、仍然完好无损时，那份惊喜可想而知。

segments.text: A colony of bees had turned the engine into a hive and it was totally preserved in beeswax.

translations.zh-Hans: 一群蜜蜂把这台发动机变成了蜂巢，蜂蜡将它完整地保存了下来。
